message:
feat(url-bar): platform-specific shortcuts (Cmd on macOS, Ctrl on Linux)

- macOS: Cmd+A/X/C/V for select all/cut/copy/paste
- macOS: Cmd+Left/Right for beginning/end of line
- macOS: Option+Left/Right for word navigation
- Linux: Ctrl+A/X/C/V for select all/cut/copy/paste
- Linux: Ctrl+Left/Right for word navigation
- Fix Kitty keyboard protocol modifier parsing (was incorrectly detecting alt)
- Capture super/Cmd modifier from Kitty protocol
